description: Use this API to tabulate certain case totals, as contained in the working case, with those of a designated Saved Case (activity CMPR). Either system totals, area totals, owner totals, or zone totals may be compared. It must be referenced using one of the following procedures: - One reference with APIOPT=1, followed by any number of references with APIOPT=2, followed by one reference with APIOPT=3. - One reference with APIOPT=0. This automatically combines the processing of one APIOPT 1 reference, followed by one APIOPT 2 reference, followed by one APIOPT 3 reference. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = cmpr(sid, apiopt, status, thrsh, cfile)
python_syntax: ierr = cmpr(sid, apiopt, status, thrsh, cfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid area, zone or owner subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 1; 0 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation in the api. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying The value of each element is as follows. (input).

parameters.name: thrsh
parameters.description: Difference threshold, in either engineering units or a percent, based on the value of status(2). (input; used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 0.0 by default).

parameters.name: cfile
parameters.description: Saved case file to be compared against the working case (when apiopt is 0 or 1). (input; no default allowed).

apiopt.description: initialize for case totals comparison, run the comparison specified by STATUS(3), and run post-processing clean up.
initialize system for system, area, owner, zone totals.
calculate and report system, area, owner, zone totals.

status.description: tabulation method (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 1; 0 by default).
tabulate area totals for area subsystem SID.
tabulate owner totals for owner subsystem SID.
tabulate zone totals for zone subsystem SID.
units for the difference threshold (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 0 by default).
quantity to be compared (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 2; 1 by default).
compare interchange; not valid for STATUS(1) = 2.
file to restore into the working case upon completion (used only when APIOPT is 0 or 3; 0 by default).
restore the comparison file to the working case.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
error writing the working case to a temporary file.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
